title: Did anno really say these things
display_title: Did anno really say these things
wikitext:
[]: Did anno really say these things? Post by DatDude » Thu Sep 27, 2007 6:14 pm The eva wiki quote has a few things on it I want to know if anno really said. Seeing as its wiki and about eva I have reason to be skeptical http://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion # "You're an idiot. Study harder." -Hideaki Anno, to a man who had spent all his textbook money on Evangelion merchandise # "It's strange that 'Evangelion' has become such a hit - all the characters are so sick!" - Hideaki Anno.

[]: Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 27, 2007 7:14 pm I don't know about the first one, but the second one comes from: http://www.aoianime.hu/evangelion/index.php?page=interanno

[]: Post by TriLink » Thu Sep 27, 2007 7:20 pm I've never heard either of them, but they do sound like things Anno would say. He's a world renowned prick after all.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Sep 27, 2007 7:34 pm My biggest admirer on this forum (TriLink12) wrote: <snip> He's a world renowned prick after all.

[]: Post by slothen » Thu Sep 27, 2007 8:25 pm those seem like perfectly reasonable things to say.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Thu Sep 27, 2007 9:23 pm I completely agree with Anno's first statement. His second one's connotation was probably misinterpreted. He was prob'ly surprised at the popularity because of how bizarrely (for shonen series) and realistically flawed the characters were.

[]: Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 27, 2007 10:09 pm If you click on the link that I posted, the quote is the very first thing, and it's standalone (i.e. no context at all). It's an article that Amos Wong wrote after interviewing Anno at Anime Expo 96, so it's like right after the series finished airing, if that can give any context to the statement.

[]: Re: Did anno really say these things? Post by master0rolando » Fri Sep 28, 2007 12:02 am "You're an idiot. Study harder." -Hideaki Anno, to a man who had spent all his textbook money on Evangelion merchandise i agree with Anno...i would've said the same thing...

[]: Post by Hunter21 » Fri Sep 28, 2007 1:33 pm The second quote I know about but I would like to see the article's source for that first lone. I haven't really ever heard him say something like that before.

[]: Post by Apathetic Piggy » Fri Sep 28, 2007 1:37 pm Was Anno supposed to shake his hand and thank him for wasting his education on anime merch? I'm surprised that's all he said...

[]: Post by CitizenGeek » Fri Sep 28, 2007 1:50 pm Those two things aren't very hard to believe, IMO. It does seem hypocritical of Anno to tell someone that's bought all the crazy merchandise his own company puts out there that he is an "idiot". But then, Anno is a pretty famous "prick" as someone else already pointed out.

[]: Post by master0rolando » Fri Sep 28, 2007 6:11 pm its not his fault if Gainax milks his show to death... someone who spends textbook money on Eva fandom is a loser anyway... honestly i would've been like. "Why would you do something like that?" and see if they could come up with any response...

[]: Post by Apathetic Piggy » Fri Sep 28, 2007 6:36 pm CitizenGeek wrote: Those two things aren't very hard to believe, IMO. It does seem hypocritical of Anno to tell someone that's bought all the crazy merchandise his own company puts out there that he is an "idiot". But then, Anno is a pretty famous "prick" as someone else already pointed out.

[]: Re: Did anno really say these things? Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 28, 2007 6:41 pm DatDude wrote: The eva wiki quote has a few things on it I want to know if anno really said. Seeing as its wiki and about eva I have reason to be skeptical http://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion # "You're an idiot. Study harder." -Hideaki Anno, to a man who had spent all his textbook money on Evangelion merchandise

[]: Post by DatDude » Fri Sep 28, 2007 6:44 pm Thank you monkey

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Sep 28, 2007 10:43 pm Thanks for pointing that out, Datdude and Monkey. I was wondering about the first quote. It makes sense he'd say that, seeing as Gainax is the one that milks his show and make Rei & Asuka even more so Faptastic. Plus, Real Life IS more important than geeking out. You gotta have your priorities straight and all.

[]: Post by Defectron » Sat Sep 29, 2007 12:32 am It does seem hypocritical of Anno to tell someone that's bought all the crazy merchandise his own company puts out there that he is an "idiot". But then, Anno is a pretty famous "prick" as someone else already pointed out.

[]: Post by Avatar of Dreams » Sat Sep 29, 2007 1:12 am Anno can say whatever he wants to say about Evangelion.

[]: Post by Incisivis » Sat Sep 29, 2007 11:31 am Heh. I'm glad to find out that Anno's second quote is real. It's something I've often wondered. And I agree very very much with his first one. Education forever! Then you can get a well-paying job and buy more stuff! (Okay, bad idea, just that this is coming from the person whose chosen profession won't bring in the big money) I also do find it a little skeevy that much of the Rei and Asuka merchandise doesn't have their "character" in it, and that they are intensely sexualized. But it's not like that happening was a surprise.

[]: Post by DatDude » Sat Sep 29, 2007 4:41 pm [code:1]# "It's strange that 'Evangelion' has become such a hit - all the characters are so sick!" - Hideaki Anno.[/code:1] Did we find anything on the other quote it attributes to anno?
